mapper.select: SELECT id, service_name, description, thumbnail_url, operation_type, category, max_member_count, base_price, price_per_member, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sub_product ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, service_name, description, thumbnail_url, operation_type, category, max_member_count, base_price, price_per_member, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sub_product WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sub_product ( id, service_name, description, thumbnail_url, operation_type, category, max_member_count, base_price, price_per_member, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{serviceName}, #{description}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{operationType}, #{category}, #{maxMemberCount}, #{basePrice}, #{pricePerMember}, 'ACTIVE', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE sub_product SET service_name = #{serviceName}, description = #{description}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, category = #{category}, max_member_count = #{maxMemberCount}, base_price = #{basePrice}, price_per_member = #{pricePerMember}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
